name: New Jersey Certified Nursing Assistant Certification
description: Already certified as a CNA? Here's whether your certification transfers to New Jersey - endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

address.description: New Jersey Department of Health, P.O. Box 367, Trenton, NJ 08625-0367

requiredDocuments.name: Proof of Training
requiredDocuments.description: Certificate of completion from your approved CNA training program.

requiredDocuments.name: State Competency Exam Results
requiredDocuments.description: Official verification of passing your state's nurse aide competency evaluation.

fingerprinting.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan OR FD-258 hard card via mail

mainEntity.name: Who administers the New Jersey CNA exam?

acceptedAnswer.text: The NJ Nurse Aide exam is administered by PSI. Schedule at psiexams.com or call 1-800-733-9267.

mainEntity.name: How do I transfer my CNA to New Jersey?

acceptedAnswer.text: Contact the NJ DOH at (866) 561-5914 or email CNA@doh.nj.gov, or contact PSI at (877) 774-4243 / njna@psionline.com.
